conversation.text: Send a daily Slack message at 9am on weekdays.
Which channel should I post to, and what should the message say?

executionScenarios.name: happy-path
executionScenarios.description: Minimal multi-turn smoke test: one clarification + setup-wizard placeholder resolution
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The schedule trigger fires once at the configured weekday morning time. The Slack node returns a success response with channel id and ts.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow runs without errors. The schedule trigger is configured for weekday mornings (around 9am). A Slack post node sends a message to the #standup channel containing the phrase 'Morning everyone'. The Slack node parameters must NOT contain any literal '<__PLACEHOLDER_VALUE__' strings.
